parsedJson.summary: The website uses a dated layout with a heavy image overlay and cluttered navigation that obscures the primary call to action, making it difficult for local customers to quickly identify the business's value proposition.

issues.title: Hero text is hard to read against busy background
issues.what_observed: The main hero section features a photograph of a family with a semi-transparent blue overlay. The white text ('Same House more home!') and the yellow script font ('more home!') struggle to contrast against the busy background details.
issues.why_problem: Visitors decide within seconds if a site is relevant. If they have to squint to read the headline or struggle to distinguish the text from the background, they will bounce. The busy background distracts from the message.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A clean, solid color background (e.g., white or light grey) with a high-quality image placed to the side (desktop) or below the text (mobile), ensuring the headline is in a bold, dark sans-serif font with high contrast.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the full-width background image. Use a split layout: text on the left, image on the right. Ensure the headline is at least 48px font size and dark grey (#333) on a white background for maximum readability.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站的主图背景太花哨，上面的文字很难看清。就像在嘈杂的房间里听人说话，客人第一眼就抓不到重点。
issues.customer_impact: 访客通常在 8 秒内决定是否离开。如果文字看不清，他们会直接关掉网页，导致您白白浪费了从 Google 广告或搜索获得的流量。

issues.title: Primary Call-to-Action is buried and weak
issues.what_observed: The primary button 'Get in touch for a free quote!' is a yellow rectangle located at the bottom of the hero section. It is visually competing with the text above it and is not the most prominent element on the screen.
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching for 'roofing Brisbane' wants to contact the business immediately. If the button is small, blends in, or is buried under paragraphs of text, the user has to hunt for it, increasing the chance they will leave.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A large, high-contrast button (e.g., bright orange or blue) placed immediately below the headline, above the fold. It should say 'Get a Free Quote' and be the most distinct element on the page.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move the CTA button up, directly under the 'Bigger. Brighter. Better.' headline. Increase the button size (padding) and use a color that contrasts sharply with the background (e.g., a strong blue or orange) to draw the eye.
issues.plain_explanation: “免费报价”按钮藏得太深，而且不够显眼。客人想联系您，但找不到按钮，就像去商店买东西却找不到收银台一样。
issues.customer_impact: 行动号召（CTA）不显眼会直接导致转化率下降。对于本地服务行业，每 10 个访客中可能因此流失 3-5 个潜在客户，直接损失收入。

issues.title: Navigation menu is too dense and distracting
issues.what_observed: The top navigation bar contains 8 distinct links (Home, About Us, Our Services, Our Product Range, Be Inspired, Our Showroom, FAQs, Contact Us) plus social icons and contact info, all crammed into a single row.
issues.why_problem: Too many choices cause 'analysis paralysis'. A visitor looking for a quote doesn't care about 'Be Inspired' or 'Our Showroom' yet. The clutter makes the site look disorganized and unprofessional.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simplified menu with max 5 items: Home, Services, About, Gallery, Contact. 'Contact Us' should be a distinct button, not just text. Secondary links can be moved to the footer.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the menu to 4-5 core items. Move 'FAQs', 'Be Inspired', and 'Our Showroom' to the footer. Make 'Contact Us' a distinct button style to separate it from informational links.
issues.plain_explanation: 导航栏塞了太多选项，让客人眼花缭乱。他们只想找服务或联系方式，过多的链接会让网站显得杂乱无章，不够专业。
issues.customer_impact: 杂乱的导航会让访客感到困惑，降低对品牌的信任度。研究表明，清晰的导航能提升 20% 以上的用户停留时间，混乱的菜单则会让客人迅速流失。

issues.title: Phone number is not a sticky, clickable element
issues.what_observed: The phone number is visible in the top header bar, but it is small text next to an icon. It is not a large, sticky button that follows the user as they scroll.
issues.why_problem: 70% of local searches happen on mobile. A user on a phone wants to tap a number to call immediately. If they have to scroll back up to the top to find a small number, they will likely switch to a competitor.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A sticky 'Call Now' button fixed to the bottom of the screen on mobile devices, visible at all times regardless of scroll position.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Implement a sticky bottom bar for mobile views containing a large 'Call 07 3889 6688' button. Ensure the header phone number is also clickable (tel: link).
issues.plain_explanation: 在手机上看网站时，电话号码太小且不固定。客人想打电话咨询，却找不到按钮，这会让想立刻联系您的客户流失。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索用户中 70% 使用手机。如果电话按钮不明显，您会直接失去那些急需服务的客户，导致潜在客户流向竞争对手。

positive_observations: The value proposition 'Same House, More Home' is clear and relevant to the attic renovation niche.
The use of a family photo in the hero section helps humanize the brand and suggests a family-friendly service.
The color scheme (teal and yellow) is consistent with the logo, maintaining brand identity.
redesign_priorities: 1. Implement a sticky 'Call Now' button for mobile users to capture immediate leads.
2. Simplify the hero section: remove the busy background image, increase headline contrast, and move the CTA button above the fold.
3. Streamline the navigation menu to reduce cognitive load and highlight the 'Contact' action.
